label: Instrument & Account
description: Instrument selector, account picker, live bid/ask price, and quick-action buttons for the active terminal.

l0.notes: 0.1 PASS — WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2 PASS — requiredEntitlements: ['execution-basic','execution-full']. 0.3 PASS — availableOn: ['terminal']. 0.4 PASS — zero any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 PASS — no lib/mocks imports. 0.6 BLOCKED — TerminalData context exposes no isLoading field; terminal page shows page-level error banner but per-widget skeleton requires context extension. 0.7 PARTIAL — instrument selector and account selector loop safely over empty arrays; live price area always renders from selectedInstrument which is never null (context guarantees default). Functionally safe but no explicit empty-guard UI. 0.8 BLOCKED — no error field in TerminalData context; requires context extension to propagate per-data-source error into widget. 0.9 PASS — no dead code or commented-out blocks.

l1.notes: 1.1 PASS — all data via useTerminalData(). 1.2 PASS — use-terminal-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope() and reads context.mode, context.strategyIds. 1.3 N/A — instrument-bar is a control-bar that drives scope selection (instrument, account) rather than being filtered by org/client scope; no tabular data to filter. 1.4 N/A — same reason as 1.3. 1.5 PASS — context wires context.strategyIds to auto-select matching instrument (see strategyInstruments map and useEffect). 1.6 N/A — control-bar widget; empty scope arrays do not change its display. 1.7 PASS — default instrument list lives in use-terminal-page-data.ts (not lib/mocks).

knownIssues.description: No per-widget loading skeleton. TerminalData context exposes no isLoading field. Terminal page shows a page-level error banner but individual widgets cannot show a loading spinner without a context extension.
knownIssues.blockedBy: TerminalData context missing isLoading field — requires context owner to add it before widget fix is possible

knownIssues.description: No per-widget error state. TerminalData context exposes no error field. The page-level error banner covers tickers/positions/alerts at page level, not per-widget.
knownIssues.blockedBy: TerminalData context missing error/isError fields — requires context extension

findings: Widget is a pure control-bar (drives instrument + account selection). Scope filtering checks 1.3/1.4/1.6 are legitimately N/A.
L0 0.6 and 0.8 are blocked by the context API — not fixable within widget file alone.
All other L0 and L1 checks pass cleanly.
RefreshCw, Settings, and Maximize2 buttons in the action strip have empty onClick handlers — flagged for L4 (4.1 dead buttons).
